source_docs.title: Simultaneous epitope and transcriptome measurement in single cells
Cell Surface Protein Labeling for Single Cell RNA Sequencing Protocols (CG000149 Rev D)
Chromium 5-prime v1.1 Feature Barcoding User Guide (CG000208 Rev G)

oligos.name: Single Cell 5′ Gel Bead primer
oligos.role: Barcoded gel-bead capture/TSO primer that templates the 10x cell barcode + UMI onto captured molecules

components.name: TSO
components.role: template switch / capture region (rGrGrG folded to GGG)

oligos.notes: Released from the Single Cell 5′ Gel Bead (PN-2000209). Doc form: 5'-CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT-N16-N10-TTTCTTATATrGrGrG-3'. The TTTCTTATATGGG TSO doubles as the capture sequence for the antibody Feature Barcode oligo in the 5′ assay.

oligos.name: Poly-dT RT Primer
oligos.role: Reverse-transcription primer that primes polyadenylated mRNA (5′ GEX arm)

components.name: Anchor
components.role: anchored VN at the poly(dT) 3′ end

oligos.notes: PN-2000007. Not directly part of the Feature Barcode library, but co-loaded in the GEM to capture mRNA for the paired 5′ GEX library.

oligos.name: Feature Barcode antibody-oligonucleotide (TotalSeq-C, 5′ v1.1)
oligos.role: Antibody-conjugated oligo whose 15 nt Feature Barcode identifies the target cell-surface protein (ADT)

components.name: Capture Sequence
components.role: anneals to gel-bead TSO (TTTCTTATATGGG) for capture

oligos.notes: From CG000149 Table 1 (Single Cell 5′ v1, v1.1 & v2 – Cell Surface Protein). CCCATATAAGAAA is the reverse complement of the gel-bead TSO TTTCTTATATGGG, enabling template-switch capture. Conjugated to a purified antibody (BioLegend TotalSeq-C or Abcam ab218260 custom conjugation).

oligos.name: SC5′ Feature cDNA Primer – Forward
oligos.role: Forward amplification primer (partial TruSeq Read 1) for barcoded cDNA and Feature Barcode DNA

oligos.name: cDNA Amplification Reverse Primer
oligos.role: Reverse amplification primer against the poly-dT RT handle (amplifies mRNA-derived cDNA)
oligos.notes: Part of SC5′ Feature cDNA Primers PN-2000119; amplifies the paired 5′ GEX cDNA.

oligos.name: SC5′ Feature cDNA Primer – Reverse (Feature)
oligos.role: Reverse amplification primer against the Feature Barcode Nextera Read 2N handle

components.name: Nextera Read 2N handle
components.role: reverse PCR handle for Feature Barcode DNA

oligos.notes: Part of SC5′ Feature cDNA Primers PN-2000119; amplifies antibody-derived Feature Barcode DNA.

oligos.name: SI Primer – Forward (P5)
oligos.role: Sample Index PCR forward primer adding P5 + TruSeq Read 1

oligos.name: Sample Index PCR Reverse Primer (Single Index Plate N Set A, i7)
oligos.role: Sample Index PCR reverse primer adding the i7 sample index + P7 to the Cell Surface Protein library

components.name: i7 Sample Index
components.role: 8 nt sample index (mix of 4 per well)

oligos.notes: Single Index Plate N Set A, PN-3000427 (used ONLY for Cell Surface Protein libraries; distinct from Plate T used for GEX/VDJ). Each well is a mix of 4 base-balanced index sequences.

components.name: P7
components.role: P7 flow-cell adapter (final-library 3′ end is the reverse complement ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG)

oligos.name: Nextera Read 2 (Read 2N) sequencing primer
oligos.role: Read 2 sequencing primer for the Cell Surface Protein library (reads the Feature Barcode)
oligos.notes: TruSeq Read 2 (GTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGCTCTTCCGATCT) is used for GEX/VDJ; the Feature Barcode library instead uses Nextera Read 2N.

final_library.source_label: 10x Chromium Single Cell 5′ v1.1 Cell Surface Protein (Feature Barcode) library

evidence.locator: 10x Chromium Single Cell 5′ v1.1 Cell Surface Protein (Feature Barcode) library

library_generation.title: Cell surface protein labeling
library_generation.summary: Cells are stained with antibodies conjugated to Feature Barcode oligonucleotides.
library_generation.note: Live cells are incubated with TotalSeq-C antibody–oligo conjugates (after Fc block), then washed. Each bound antibody carries an oligo encoding a 15 nt Feature Barcode plus a 3′ capture sequence and a Nextera Read 2N handle.

library_generation.title: GEM capture (TSO ⟷ capture-sequence annealing)
library_generation.summary: Inside a GEM, the antibody oligo's capture sequence anneals to the gel-bead TSO.
library_generation.note: The gel bead is dissolved; its primer presents the TSO TTTCTTATATGGG, whose sequence is complementary to the antibody oligo capture sequence CCCATATAAGAAA. The two 3′ ends hybridize, priming extension.

library_generation.title: Extension / reverse transcription (GEM)
library_generation.summary: Polymerase extends the gel-bead primer along the antibody oligo, appending cell barcode + UMI.
library_generation.note: The MMLV RT extends the barcoded primer using the antibody oligo as template, producing 10x-Barcoded Feature Barcode DNA that copies through to the Nextera Read 2N handle.

library_generation.title: cDNA / Feature Barcode amplification
library_generation.summary: Bulk PCR with SC5′ Feature cDNA Primers amplifies the barcoded Feature Barcode DNA.
library_generation.note: Forward primer CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT and the Feature reverse primer CTCGTGGGCTCGGAGATGTGTATAAGAGAC amplify ADT DNA (mRNA-derived cDNA is amplified in the same tube by the poly-dT-handle reverse primer).

library_generation.title: Size selection (separate ADT from cDNA)
library_generation.summary: 0.6X SPRI separates short Feature Barcode DNA (supernatant) from full-length cDNA (pellet).
library_generation.note: The transferred supernatant (Feature Barcode DNA) is cleaned with 2.0X SPRI and carried forward to Sample Index PCR; the pellet cDNA goes to GEX/VDJ construction.

library_generation.title: Sample Index PCR (Cell Surface Protein library)
library_generation.summary: SI Primer (P5) + Single Index Plate N (i7) add P5, the sample index and P7, completing the library.
library_generation.note: Forward primer AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTC adds P5; reverse primer CAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGAT-[i7]-GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG adds the i7 index and P7 and completes the Nextera Read 2N region.

library_sequencing.note: Reads the 16 nt 10x cell barcode + 10 nt UMI. Primer sequence matches the top strand and anneals to the bottom (template) strand, extending into the barcode+UMI region.
library_sequencing.diagram:
5'-ACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT----------------------------->
5'- ...GAGATCTACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCTNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNTTTCTTATATGGG...-3'  top
3'- ...CTCTAGATGTGAGAAAGGGATGTGCTGCGAGAAGGCTAGANNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNAAAGAATATACCC...-5'  bottom (template)
                                             |----- 26 nt read -----|
                                             [16 nt 10x cell barcode][10 nt UMI]

library_sequencing.primer: Index-1 read primer / top-strand Read 2N handle (CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTCCGAGCCCACGAGAC)
library_sequencing.note: Reads the 8 nt i7 sample index (Single Index Plate N Set A, used only for Cell Surface Protein libraries). Primer 3' end abuts the index and extends into it.

Reads the 15 nt antibody Feature Barcode (ADT identity), flanked by spacers. Read 2N primer is complementary to the top-strand Nextera handle; its 3' end sits at the FB-proximal end and extends leftward. Minimum required Read 2 length is 25 bp; typically 91 bp when co-sequenced with GEX/VDJ.

title: 10x Chromium 5′ Feature Barcoding (Cell Surface Protein)
description: A droplet single-cell assay that measures cell-surface protein abundance alongside 5′ gene expression and V(D)J. Cells are stained with antibodies conjugated to a Feature Barcode oligonucleotide (TotalSeq-C); inside each GEM the oligo's 3′ capture sequence anneals to the gel-bead template-switch oligo (TSO) and is extended, appending a shared 16 nt 10x cell barcode and 10 nt UMI. The resulting antibody-derived tag (ADT) DNA is amplified, size-separated from cDNA, and finished into an Illumina library by Sample Index PCR. Read 1 reads the cell barcode + UMI, the i7 read gives the sample index, and Read 2 (Nextera Read 2N) reads the 15 nt antibody Feature Barcode.

reference.label: Simultaneous epitope and transcriptome measurement in single cells

throughput.summary: Droplet-based; ~1,000 cells recovered per reaction at ~0.8% multiplet rate, scalable to ~10,000 cells recovered (~17,400 loaded) per reaction.
throughput.rna: Paired 5′ gene-expression profile per cell (>4,000 transcripts detectable)
throughput.dna: Antibody-derived tag (ADT) counts per cell; ~100 molecules per ADT per cell targeted

publication.statistical_model: Poisson (droplet cell-capture / doublet-rate modeling); ADT counts are centered-log-ratio (CLR) normalized

other.label: Commercial kit
other.value: 10x Genomics Chromium Next GEM Single Cell V(D)J v1.1 with Feature Barcode technology for Cell Surface Protein (CG000208); antibody labeling per CG000149

other.label: Antibody conjugate
other.value: BioLegend TotalSeq-C (5′ v1/v1.1/v2) or Abcam Oligonucleotide Conjugation Kit ab218260

other.label: Sample index
other.value: Cell Surface Protein libraries use Single Index Plate N Set A (PN-3000427); GEX/VDJ use Plate T

other.label: Sequencing depth
other.value: Minimum 5,000 read pairs per cell for the Cell Surface Protein library

data_processing.summary: CITE-seq splits into two computational readouts from one cell barcode: mRNA reads are aligned and UMI-collapsed into a gene×cell matrix, while antibody-derived tag (ADT) reads are demultiplexed by shared cell barcode + antibody Feature Barcode and collapsed by UMI into a protein×cell matrix. The two modalities are normalized separately (RNA log-normalized; ADT centered-log-ratio) and then jointly used for graph-based clustering and 2D visualization.
data_processing.statistical_model: ADT counts centered-log-ratio (CLR) normalized (compositional data); droplet cell-capture / doublet rate modeled as Poisson.
